---
name: Playtest + Feedback Log
about: Capture structured playtest findings and triage
labels: [playtest]
---

## Objective
Collect structured playtest feedback and convert it into actionable fixes.

## Scope
- Multi-pass testing
- Categorized issue logging
- Prioritized triage

## Checklist
- [ ] Run at least 3 playtest sessions
- [ ] Log findings in consistent format:
  - [ ] Timestamp/section
  - [ ] Issue type (timing/readability/comfort/flow/etc.)
  - [ ] Severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low)
  - [ ] Suggested fix
- [ ] Tag and prioritize critical/high issues
- [ ] Add repro/context notes for major issues
- [ ] Post triage summary with top fixes

## Acceptance Criteria
- Feedback is structured and complete enough to act on immediately
- Critical/high issues are clearly identified and prioritized
- Next polish pass has a concrete fix list

## Deliverables
- Playtest log in issue comments or linked doc
- Prioritized fix summary comment
